title: Opening for Store Manager at Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates:
Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates!
